summary: P1.1 Continue/Remix Optimization — Dependency-aware checkpoint reuse VERIFIED. 16/16 backend tests passed. All key features working: GET /api/story-engine/analyze-reuse returns reuse_mode, reusable_stages, invalidated_stages, estimated_time_saved_percent; Style Remix correctly identifies PLANNING/CHARACTER/MOTION/AUDIO as reusable and KEYFRAMES/CLIPS/ASSEMBLY as invalidated; Voice Remix correctly identifies visual stages as reusable and AUDIO/ASSEMBLY as invalidated; No-change returns full_reuse with all 7 stages reusable; POST /api/story-engine/create accepts parent_video_id and returns reuse info; GET /api/story-engine/status returns reuse_info field; analyze-reuse rejects non-existent parent with 404; State machine allows INIT to any active state for checkpoint skip; Frontend ProgressiveGeneration has reuse-badge and stage-reused-* data-testids; StoryVideoPipeline passes reuseInfo prop.
critical_code_review_comments: pipeline.py: analyze_reuse() function at lines 210-267 correctly determines reuse_mode based on INVALIDATION_MAP
pipeline.py: apply_reuse_checkpoints() function at lines 282-352 copies valid checkpoints and advances job state
pipeline.py: process_next_stage() at lines 426-440 checks reuse_info and skips stages whose outputs were already copied
pipeline.py: STAGE_OUTPUTS mapping at lines 188-196 defines which fields each stage produces
pipeline.py: INVALIDATION_MAP at lines 199-207 defines which inputs invalidate which stages
state_machine.py: VALID_TRANSITIONS at lines 15-22 allows INIT to transition to any active state for checkpoint skip
story_engine_routes.py: GET /analyze-reuse endpoint at lines 630-679 returns reuse analysis preview
story_engine_routes.py: POST /create at lines 442-495 applies reuse checkpoints and returns reuse info
story_engine_routes.py: GET /status returns reuse_info field at line 625
StoryVideoPipeline.js: Captures reuse info from create response at lines 535-545
StoryVideoPipeline.js: Passes reuseInfo prop to ProgressiveGeneration at line 829

success_rate.frontend: 100% (all reuse-related UI elements verified in source code)

seed_data_creation: None - used existing test users and known story_engine job
context_for_next_testing_agent: P1.1 Continue/Remix Optimization fully verified in iteration 390. Key findings: 1) GET /api/story-engine/analyze-reuse endpoint works correctly with parent_job_id query param, returns reuse_mode (full_reuse/style_remix/voice_remix/partial_remix/continue), reusable_stages array with {id, label}, invalidated_stages array, and estimated_time_saved_percent; 2) Style Remix (changing animation_style) correctly identifies PLANNING/BUILDING_CHARACTER_CONTEXT/PLANNING_SCENE_MOTION/GENERATING_AUDIO as reusable and GENERATING_KEYFRAMES/GENERATING_SCENE_CLIPS/ASSEMBLING_VIDEO as invalidated; 3) Voice Remix (changing voice_preset) correctly identifies visual stages as reusable and GENERATING_AUDIO/ASSEMBLING_VIDEO as invalidated; 4) No-change analysis returns full_reuse mode with all 7 stages reusable and 100% time saved; 5) POST /api/story-engine/create with parent_video_id returns reuse_mode, stages_reused, stages_to_generate in response; 6) GET /api/story-engine/status/{job_id} returns reuse_info field containing parent_job_id, reuse_mode, reused_stages, invalidated_stages, start_from, applied_at; 7) analyze-reuse correctly returns 404 for non-existent parent_job_id; 8) State machine VALID_TRANSITIONS allows INIT to transition to any active state (PLANNING through ASSEMBLING_VIDEO) for checkpoint skip; 9) Frontend ProgressiveGeneration.js has data-testid='reuse-badge' and data-testid='stage-reused-*' labels; 10) StoryVideoPipeline.js captures reuseInfo from create response and passes it to ProgressiveGeneration component.

analyze_reuse_endpoint_exists.details: GET /api/story-engine/analyze-reuse endpoint exists and accepts parent_job_id query param

style_remix_analysis.details: Changing animation_style correctly identifies PLANNING/CHARACTER/MOTION/AUDIO as reusable, KEYFRAMES/CLIPS/ASSEMBLY as invalidated

voice_remix_analysis.details: Changing voice_preset correctly identifies visual stages as reusable, AUDIO/ASSEMBLY as invalidated

no_change_full_reuse.details: No-change returns full_reuse mode with all 7 stages reusable and 100% time saved

create_with_parent_video_id.details: POST /api/story-engine/create accepts parent_video_id and returns reuse_mode, stages_reused, stages_to_generate

status_returns_reuse_info.details: GET /api/story-engine/status/{job_id} returns reuse_info field when applicable

state_machine_init_transitions.details: VALID_TRANSITIONS allows INIT to transition to any active state for checkpoint skip

frontend_stage_reused_testids.details: ProgressiveGeneration.js has data-testid='stage-reused-*' labels at line 622

frontend_reuse_info_prop.details: StoryVideoPipeline.js passes reuseInfo prop to ProgressiveGeneration at line 829

pipeline_stage_outputs_mapping.details: STAGE_OUTPUTS mapping exists with all 7 stages

pipeline_invalidation_map.details: INVALIDATION_MAP exists with story_text, style_id, voice_preset triggers
